Package org.rodinp.core.emf.api.itf

Interface ILElement

All Known Subinterfaces:
ImplicitElement, InternalElement, LightElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
ImplicitElementImpl, InternalElementImpl, LightElementImpl
public interface ILElement
A representation of the model object 'IL Element'.
